sub.name: MCP Sub: BFL FLUX Image Generation

parameters.name: generate_image
parameters.description: Generate a single image with BFL FLUX 2. Covers text-to-image AND image editing: pass file_ref to edit a user-uploaded photo, OR image_url to edit a previously generated image. Returns the image inline if ready within ~25s, otherwise returns a polling_url and you must call wait_for_image to keep waiting. Parameters: prompt (required, what to generate or how to edit), model (optional: flux-2-pro [default], flux-2-max [highest quality], flux-2-flex [best typography], flux-2-klein-9b, flux-2-klein-4b [cheapest+fastest], flux-2-pro-preview, flux-2-klein-9b-preview), width/height (optional, default 1024, min 64), file_ref (optional, file-bridge id of a user-uploaded photo to edit), image_url (optional, URL of a previous BFL generation to edit/vary), seed (optional integer for reproducibility).

value.prompt: ={{ $fromAI('prompt', 'Detailed description of the image to generate, or for editing: what to change about the input image', 'string') }}
value.model: ={{ $fromAI('model', 'FLUX 2 model id: flux-2-pro (default), flux-2-max, flux-2-flex, flux-2-klein-9b, flux-2-klein-4b, flux-2-pro-preview, flux-2-klein-9b-preview', 'string') }}
value.file_ref: ={{ $fromAI('file_ref', 'Optional: file-bridge id of a user-uploaded image to edit (usually present when the user just sent a photo)', 'string') }}
value.image_url: ={{ $fromAI('image_url', 'Optional: URL of a previous BFL-generated image to edit or vary', 'string') }}

parameters.name: wait_for_image
parameters.description: Wait up to ~25 seconds for a BFL FLUX generation that did not finish in the initial generate_image call. Returns the finished image when ready, or a 'still generating, call again' message if not yet ready. Keep calling with the same polling_url until you get the file. Most generations finish on the first attempt; FLUX 2 Max may need 1-2 wait_for_image calls. Parameters: polling_url (required, the URL returned by generate_image when status was pending).

value.polling_url: ={{ $fromAI('polling_url', 'The BFL polling URL returned by a previous generate_image call', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_credits
parameters.description: Return the remaining BFL credit balance for the configured API key. 1 credit = $0.01 USD. Typical costs: klein-4b ~1.4 credits/image, pro ~6-8 credits/image, max ~12-15 credits/image. Takes no parameters.
